task.title: Dashboard and Notification Management
task.description: Implement main dashboard with notification feed and management interfaces

implementation.details:
1. Create dashboard page with notification overview
2. Implement real-time notification feed with WebSocket
3. Add notification history with filtering
4. Create integration management interface
5. Build rule configuration wizard with drag-and-drop

task.acceptance_criteria: Dashboard displays notifications, real-time updates work, can manage integrations and rules, filtering functional
